description_long: This rifle features a streamlined, modern design with an olive green synthetic stock and a matte black barrel. The stock is robust and fixed, with a thick, textured buttpad for recoil absorption and a contoured grip for ergonomic handling. The receiver area includes a Picatinny rail for mounting optics, and the trigger guard is integrated into the stock. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the forend, and appears to be of a standard profile. No magazine is visible, suggesting it may use an internal magazine or the magazine is not currently inserted. The overall finish is matte, reducing glare and enhancing its tactical appearance.
description: A modern rifle with an olive green synthetic stock, matte black barrel, and integrated Picatinny rail. The design is streamlined and robust, with a fixed stock and no visible magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing a narrow profile with the barrel and stock aligned vertically.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the olive green stock, black barrel, Picatinny rail, and thick buttpad.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the butt end, showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same features including the fixed stock, long barrel, and rail system.
